Did you mean "pg_catalog.pg_prepared_statements"?

LINE 4: JOIN products_orders.OrderItem oi ON oli.Id = oi.PriceBookEntryI...
             ^"

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * pbe.UnitPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON o.Id = oli.OpportunityId
JOIN products_orders.OrderItem oi ON oli.Id = oi.PriceBookEntryId
JOIN products_orders.PricebookEntry pbe ON oi.PriceBookEntryId = pbe.Id
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:

JOIN products_orders.PricebookEntry pbe ON oi.PriceBookEntryId = pbe.Id
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oli.Quantity * oli.TotalPrice / NULLIF(oli.Quantity,0)) AS sales_amount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON o.Id = oli.OpportunityId
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oli.Quantity * oli.TotalPrice / NULLIF(oli.Quantity,0)) AS sales_amount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON o.Id = oli.OpportunityId
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(CAST(oli.Quantity AS DOUBLE) * CAST(oli.TotalPrice AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(CAST(oli.Quantity AS DOUBLE),0)) AS sales_amount
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON o.Id = oli.OpportunityId
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:

JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
